positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic owl sitting on a crescent moon, surrounded by geometric constellations and ethereal smoke. The owl should have deep, rich brown feathers and intense yellow eyes. The style must be a clean, modern linocut etching mixed with bioluminescent glow elements. Strong silhouettes, high contrast between the dark forest elements and the glowing celestial body. Color palette: deep indigo, starry gold, soft teal, and midnight black. Central composition, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Vector art quality, symmetrical balance, high detail, pop art influence.
